case_title: ACHIEVABLE SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. GENTIAN MUZHAQI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100104997), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACHIEVABLE SOLUTIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SERVED FEB-08-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-09-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT MUZHAQI, GENTIAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACHIEVABLE SOLUTIONS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUZHAQI, GENTIAN $10,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,992.16 INTEREST, $495.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,487.16, SEE SCANNED DOC
